ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group this location belongs to */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order of the location in the group */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the coordinates */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_subregion FOREIGN KEY ("subregion") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the group */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location this metadata pertains to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who validated the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location this version pertains to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in the new version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location related to this visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., map, graph) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being collaborated on */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location related to this report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
